title: rubus hedycarpus subsp. hebes
intro: Rubus hedycarpus subsp. hebes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species belonging to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Rubus hedycarpus subsp. hebes include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
